title: croton goyazensis
intro: Croton goyazensis is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the "Pitomba" tree due to its distinctive red or yellow fruits. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine in Brazil, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Croton goyazensis include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
